title.en: He didn't care about the danger at all, and jus...

content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian's copy body was successfully copied, and he began to break into the Sea of Will and look for the Source Fruit of Will.

He didn't care about the danger at all, and just shuttled quickly.

Suddenly.

He entered a special fragment of will, and a terrifying light instantly pierced his body, severely shattering his Origin Realm will.

However, he still withdrew in time, but the injury of the will of the Origin Realm was not so easy to recover.

"It's dangerous here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He continued to search, and finally found the Fruit of Will.

The Fruit of the Will Source is rooted in a void and is easy to pick.

After he plucked it, he returned the way he came, so that he would not be in danger, and then sent the Will Source Fruit to another copy body.

Immediately afterward, he continued to search for the Fruit of Will.

But this time, he was hit hard again, and his will was about to collapse.

In desperation, he could only choose to give up this replica body and re-replicate a replica body, after all, this is the fastest way to recover.

The years that followed.

He lost one copy body after another, but he also gained a lot of Will Source Fruits!

......

Will overseas.

Several Origin Dao Ancestors were very surprised, under normal circumstances, Ye Tian would definitely encounter danger, just come out to heal!

Once the will of the Origin Realm is severely damaged, it is not yet available, and there is also the possibility of encountering danger, after all, it is also a great suppression for the will of the Origin Realm, which is not conducive to healing!

But Ye Tian still didn't come out.

Unless Ye Tian is so lucky that he doesn't encounter danger once, but is this possible?

There is also a possibility, that is, Ye Tian is dead.

"It's a pity, an Origin Upper Realm Overlord who created the Fourth Path has just fallen here!"

Several Origin Dao Ancestors regretted it.

In their opinion, as long as Ye Tian does not fall in the future, it is possible to reach the level of the Origin Ancestor!

However, they only regretted it for a few seconds, and did not think too much about it.

But suddenly.

Ye Tian came out of the Sea of Will, uninjured at all, unscathed.

Seeing this scene, several Origin Dao Ancestors were stunned.

Of course, they thought that Ye Tian was careful after entering, and did not go far, so that he did not encounter danger, but the harvest was definitely not there.

"Several, I'll get out of here first!"

Ye Tian greeted.

He has already harvested a lot of Will Source Fruit, and the chance of continuing to find the Will Source Fruit is very small, and he also wants to continue to look for other places, one more copy body to find resources, and the greater the harvest!

There's no need to waste time here.

Time passed slowly, and there was less and less time left.

At this time, a Origin Upper Realm Overlord was also counting the time, and he didn't dare to miss the time to go out!

......

The Flame of the Heart is here.

Ye Tian had already practiced the Reincarnation Arcana, but he was still refining the Reincarnation Arcana with the fire of the Heart Flame, making the Reincarnation Arcana more powerful, quenching it again and again like an ordinary piece of iron, turning it into a hundred refined iron.

"It's almost, it's time to go back!"

Ye Tian put away the Reincarnation Arcana Spear, and then quickly left here.

After that, all his replica bodies gathered together, and after gathering the treasure resources together, the duplicate body with the resources shuttled towards the exit.

As for the other replica bodies still here, he wanted to see what danger would be in place if the hurricane returned.

Ye Tian was now the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had mastered the map the most, after all, he had explored too many places, where there was danger and where there was no danger, he naturally knew very well.

So, he didn't encounter the slightest danger along the way.

It didn't take long.

Ye Tian left this treasure world, came to the Hurricane Sea, and then quickly left the Hurricane Sea.

And the other Origin Upper Realm overlords also came out one by one.

However, the Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord did not come out.

"The six Origin Upper Realm Overlords have not come out!"

This means that the six Origin Upper Realm Overlords are dead.

Even if they are careful, they have a safe map, but some are more greedy, go to some dangerous places to find resources, and it is normal for them to fall.

For example, Ye Tian, I don't know how many times he fell, but he deliberately went to a dangerous place, and he belonged to looking for death, so the danger was naturally greater.

At this time.

A Origin Upper Realm Overlord was discussing his harvest and even trading with each other.

After all, some of the resources found by the Origin Upper Realm Overlords were not necessarily useful to themselves.

For example, the Origin Dao Ancestor is taking the third path, what they need is a treasure that can enhance the will of the Origin Realm and sublimate the will of the Origin Realm, and the resources that are helpful to the awakening of the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm will not help them much.

If so, the Origin Upper Realm Overlords who have followed three different paths can trade with each other.

But Ye Tian needed all resources, and he was taking the fourth path, so he didn't trade resources with other Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

Rumble!!!!

Hurricane sea, hurricane starts to blow, which means that this place has become extremely dangerous.

Inside the Treasure World.

Ye Tian's copy body stayed here, waiting for the danger to come.

Suddenly.

A terrifying force of rules descended, and he felt as if he was in another area.

The next moment.

A terrifying force pinched his replica body.

Click!

All of his copied bodies were instantly pinched and exploded.

......

"What just happened......

Ye Tian was stunned.

What kind of power is that, like a rule, and like a living being, it's very strange.

But what is certain is that it is definitely a power that surpasses the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, so he has no power to resist at all.

"Forget it, it's not a power I can reach now, let's improve my strength as much as possible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He left here with the other Origin Overlords and returned to the Eternal Lands.

Ye Tian returned to Fengya Island and began to practice in retreat.

This time, he has obtained too many treasure resources, and his strength will definitely increase rapidly.

He was looking forward to it.

"First use the Origin Blood Crystal to refine the flesh body, then use the Will Source Fruit to enhance the will of the Origin Realm, and also use other resources to enhance your own Reincarnation Haotian Origin ......"

Ye Tian began to cultivate in this way.

I have to say that the effect of these resources is very good, and his Reincarnation Haotian Body, Reincarnation Haotian Origin, and Origin Realm Will are all rapidly improving.

Time flies, hundreds of thousands of primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Reincarnation Haotian Body, Reincarnation Haotian Origin Origin, and Origin Realm Will have all been raised to the current limit, which means that he can impact the second balance, and this requires the use of the Three Origin Secret Medicine.

"Then let's start attacking the second balance!"

Ye Tian muttered.
